data.title: First Ride On 36V Kids Ride On UTV, 2-Seater 400W Electric Car for Kids 6+, 5-8 MPH Speed, 14" EVA Wheels, Metal Frame, Bluet

features: Realistic Driving Experience: This is a true driving UTV - no remote control
no artificial limits. Kids can control speed with the variable throttle pedal
shift between forward and reverse
and experience gradual start and electronic brake for real vehicle control. With Bluetooth music
FM radio
and LED lights
it turns every outdoor ride into a thrilling off-road adventure.
Built for Outdoor Fun & Lasting Play: Designed for extended outdoor play
this 36V ride-on UTV offers 40–60 minutes of runtime per charge depending on terrain. A spacious rear storage box holds toys and snacks
while the durable structure ensures years of reliable performance. The perfect gift to inspire independence
adventure
and real driving excitement in your child.
High-Performance Power System: Equipped with a 36V 9Ah battery and dual 200W high-torque motors
this UTV delivers powerful acceleration and strong climbing ability with a top speed of 5–8 mph. Designed for bigger kids ages 6+
it offers responsive performance
smooth control
and reliable power on grass
dirt
and gravel for true off-road excitement.
Large 14" EVA Tires & Metal Frame: Compared with ordinary plastic tires
EVA tires offer stronger grip and shock absorption. Built for durability and adventure

this electric ride-on car features 14-inch wear-resistant EVA tires and a reinforced metal chassis that provide excellent traction and stability across multiple terrains. Rear metal spring suspension absorbs shocks effectively
ensuring a smoother
more comfortable ride even on rough ground.
Spacious Two-Seater for Big Kids: With an overall size of 55"L × 35"W × 31"H and a 20.5" wide seat
this UTV easily fits two children or one older rider up to 130 lbs (60 kg). Each seat is equipped with a 3-point safety belt for added protection during bumpy rides
offering both safety and comfort for growing kids ages 6 and up.
